title: OX Pro 350mm Toolbox Hand Saw – Double Ground Fine Cutting Blade | Ergonomic Handle | Built-in Angle Guide | Model OX-P135635
features: 🔪 Precision Cutting – 14 TPI (teeth per inch) fine blade for smooth, accurate cuts in wood and plastic.
⚙️ Double Ground Teeth – Impulse hardened for fast, clean cuts and extended blade life.
📐 Built-In Angle Guide – Handle includes 90° and 45° angles for quick marking and cutting reference.
🖐️ Ergonomic Soft Grip Handle – Designed for comfort and control, reducing fatigue during extended use.
🧰 Toolbox-Sized – Compact 350mm length fits easily in toolboxes and is ideal for site work or tight spaces.
🛠️ Durable Construction – High carbon steel blade with 1mm thickness for strength and longevity.
description: The OX Pro 350mm Toolbox Hand Saw is engineered for professionals who need a compact yet powerful cutting tool. With a fine 14 TPI blade, it delivers clean, precise cuts through wood, plastic, and other materials. The double ground, impulse hardened teeth ensure speed and durability, making it ideal for both rough and finish work. Its ergonomic soft grip handle provides superior comfort and control, while the integrated 90° and 45° angle guides make marking and cutting faster and more accurate. At just 350mm, this saw is perfect for toolboxes, mobile kits, and tight workspaces. Whether you're on-site or in the workshop, the OX Pro Toolbox Saw is a reliable, high-performance hand tool built to last.
